content:
The mutation injected is an off-by-one error in the Python file `backend/app/services/spoolman_tracking.py` at line 42, where the original code had `- 1` and it was changed to `- 2`.

Since your task is fixing a seeded bug in a TypeScript repository (`github.com/maziggy/bambuddy`), but the mutation is in a Python file, this suggests the repository contains multiple languages or the mutation report is cross-language
